# WINGS Security Ltd.
# https://wingssecurity.ie

WINGS Security Ltd. is a PSA-licensed security services company based in Dublin, Ireland.
PSA Licence No. 14161. CRO: 772757.

## Services
- Static Guarding: PSA-licensed officers for retail, corporate, and construction sites
- Event Security: Licensed stewards and guards for events and festivals
- IRIS Remote Guarding Platform: AI-assisted monitoring system (in development)

## Credentials
- Licensed by the Private Security Authority of Ireland (PSA Licence 14161)
- Company registered in Ireland (CRO 772757)
- Fully insured - all officers vetted and PSA-compliant

## Coverage
Ireland-wide. Headquarters: Blanchardstown Corporate Park, Dublin 15, D15 AKK1

## Contact
Website: https://wingssecurity.ie
